---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new analyzer, format, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What gap exists today? What can you not do without this? -->

## Proposal

<!-- What would the feature look like? Sketch CLI / API. -->

```bash
# Example invocation:
wimsalabim scan example.com --??? 
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other tools, workarounds, or shapes you considered. -->

## Authorization story (for active features)

<!--
If this is an active or intrusive analyzer, describe how it interacts with
the AuthorizationGate. We will not accept active features without a clear
legal-class justification.
-->

## Privacy impact

<!--
Does this feature involve outbound calls to third parties? Telemetry?
Personal data? If so, describe how default-privacy is preserved.
-->

## Out of scope

<!-- What this feature explicitly does NOT do. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues / PRs for duplicates.
- [ ] This is consistent with the [project's principles](../../README.md#why-wimsalabim).
- [ ] If active: I have included an authorization story.
